Interface ITraceResults

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to network trace results.

[Guid("29C70874-C8C3-4964-B681-C14A167641EE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITraceResults
